name: King Sitic Moules Mariniere- (4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mussels and remove the beards by giving them a sideways chuck. Do not give a downwards chuck as this may tear the mussel.
2. Remove any barnacles as they will fall off and ruin the sauce.
3. Discard any opened mussels.
4. Cook the onion in a little oil until soft.
5. Add the wine and mussels, cover, and shake occasionally until all the mussels are open.
6. Add some pepper from the mill, then the cream. Bring to a boil, shaking again.
7. Transfer to a tureen and sprinkle with parsley.
8. Serve immediately.
9. Discard any mussels that did not open.
10. Do not use salt as the mussels will be naturally salty.
